last_completed_round.direction_name: Skew the B shared tile with a bank-conflict-avoidance swizzle
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The accepted 16x48 BF16 B tile is still loaded through `wmma::load_matrix_sync` with a 48-element shared stride, so each row advances by 96 bytes and repeatedly aliases the same shared-memory banks during the three adjacent matrix_b fragment loads. Adding a per-row skew to the staged B tile, while preserving 16-byte async-copy granularity, should cut the remaining `mio_throttle` and short-scoreboard pressure without undoing the 3xN reuse win from round 2.

notes: Completed round 3/20. Continue with node_b for round 4/20. Accepted base: 20260418_224421_bf16_gemm_v1_f5de2e9 at 65.617920 ms.
